text: Luc just called. Wants to bring Beau out on the water next Saturday. Kid's only 7 but he's been asking all summer, so I told him come on.
That's sweet. You gonna let him actually hold the rod or just stand there watching?
He can hold whatever he wants long as he doesn't go over the side. Putting him on a light spinning setup, maybe work the grass flats for flounder.
Does Ashley know about this yet?
That's Luc's problem. I just drive the boat. You want to come? Dock by noon, grab lunch in Bayport after.
I'm in. Don't let Beau out-fish you 😄
Had a guy on Lucky Strike this morning pull up a 38-inch redfish off Three Sisters Reef — fought it 45 minutes on 12lb. Beau still coming Saturday? Water's been perfect.
Oh man. Yeah he's been talking about it all week. Ashley wants to know if Diane's coming too so she can ride with her from Bayport.
Diane's coming. Tell Ashley meet at the harbor by 5:15, not 5:30 — tide window's tight Saturday morning and I'm not waiting on it.
Got it. Hey, Beau's been asking about the guitar in your shop, the one with the sunburst top. Is that one spoken for?
That's a commission for a guy in Gainesville. I'm starting a parlor build in August though, spruce top. Tell him if he learns three chords before Christmas I'll put his name on it.
Lol he's gonna hold you to that. See you Saturday, Capt.
Hey Dad, Ashley's taking Elise to her recital Saturday so it's just Beau. Any chance he could ride out on the Lucky Strike? He's been asking every single day since you sent that cooler pic.
Saturday's a half-day, out of Bayport at 5am, back by noon. He's old enough. Tell him bring a hat and closed-toe shoes — no flip flops on my deck.
He is gonna lose his mind lol. You think you'll be on reds or trout this time of year?
Grass flats off Hernando been holding trout all week. Might push south if the tide window opens up right. Either way he's not coming home with an empty cooler.
Perfect. Hey — Elise saw that parlor guitar sitting on your bench last time we visited. She asked me point blank if it's for her. Is it?
Tell her to get that C chord clean and she'll find out in September.
Luc just called. Wants to bring Beau out on the water next Saturday. Kid's only 7 but he's been asking all summer, so I told him come on.
That's sweet. You gonna let him actually hold the rod or just stand there watching?
